Headline: #67 67th-69th-71st , #94 California Temporary Reroute at 69th/Bell
ShortDescription: 67 67th-69th-71st , 94 California buses are temporarily rerouted : due to, street blockage near 69th/Bell.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#67 67th-69th-71st ,#94 California buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 69th, Damen, 67th and Western including normal route streets due to street blockage at 69th/Bell.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Red Line Service Running with Delays
ShortDescription: Red Line trains are running with delays at 95th signal problems.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red Line trains are running with delays at 95th signal problems.

Consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:

#29 State

#22 Clark

#24 Wentworth

Personnel are working to restore normal service. Allow extra travel time.

Headline: 63rd-bound Green and Loop 'L' Line Delays
ShortDescription: 63rd-bound Green and Loop 'L' Line trains are running w/residual delays following earlier police activity Cermak-McCormick Place. Service is resuming.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
63rd-bound Green and Loop 'L' Line trains are running w/residual delays following earlier police activity Cermak-McCormick Place.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
